name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-56
title: scope-guard.py: imports 'glob' but uses only for per-feature marker scan in decide() (cheap optimization opportunity)
description: hooks/scope-guard.py line 139: glob.glob(str(REPO_ROOT) + '/.rabbit-scope-active-*') is called on EVERY decide() invocation, even when the target path obviously will not match (e.g. write outside repo). This adds an unnecessary filesystem scan to every Write/Edit/Bash hook firing. Move the glob behind the existing early-exit checks (lines 107, 111, 115) — those return early without needing the per-feature scan. Net effect: faster default-allow paths.

history.note: wave-4 cleanup: bug invalid — see triage notes in tdd-report-rabbit-cage.json
